title: ocimum caryophyllinum
intro: Ocimum caryophyllinum, also known as sweet basil, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocimum caryophyllinum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Ocimum caryophyllinum can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb for various health and culinary purposes.
